---

## About This Report

This report is auto-generated by a Python script that queries 6 data sources:

1. **NIH Reporter API** — Federal grants referencing the proteomics core
2. **NIH iCite** — Citation counts and bibliometrics for publications
3. **NSF Award API** — NSF awards at UC Davis related to proteomics
4. **PubMed E-utilities** — Publications by core personnel + grant acknowledgments
5. **Stratocore/PPMS** — Submission records and order/invoicing data
6. **PI Grant Discovery** — Looks up each submission PI in NIH/NSF by name

The report runs automatically on the 1st of every month via [GitHub Actions](https://github.com/bsphinney/proteomics-core-site/blob/main/.github/workflows/impact-report.yml).

**Source code:** [github.com/bsphinney/proteomics-core-site](https://github.com/bsphinney/proteomics-core-site)
